waiting_for: Pullback to EMA21 (~30006) for a long EMA-bounce entry; rejection at 30100 for a short level-trade entry (lower probability).

long_assessment.reasoning: Price surged 106 pts to 30095, confirming strong uptrend (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Previous EMA-bounce level at 29815 is now 280 pts behind. New dynamic support is EMA21 at 30005.96 (89 pts below). Stochastic cooled from 83.4 to 59.81 (neutral), removing overbought concern. Psychological 30100 sits just 4.75 pts above as natural target. A pullback to EMA21 offers 2.23:1 R/R with 40-pt stop. Setup age reset to 0 bars - waiting for price to reach entry level.

short_assessment.reasoning: Price broke above 30000 (previous short trigger) but continued higher, invalidating the mean-reversion thesis. Stochastic normalized to 59.81. Only short rationale is potential rejection at psychological 30100 (4.75 pts away). However, strong EMA alignment and lack of bearish FVG/confluence make this counter-trend. Target at EMA21 (30006) +5pt buffer. Low confidence - only valid if clear rejection candle forms at 30100. Setup age: 0 bars.
